summary: Usage & Cost Tracking — token spend visibility via harness usage CLI commands with LiteLLM pricing, cost-at-read-time calculation, and opt-in Claude Code session parsing

decisions.what: Cost calculated at read time, not write time
decisions.why: Stop hook payload is not under our control; calculating at display time uses best available pricing data

decisions.what: New UsageRecord type instead of extending TokenUsage
decisions.why: TokenUsage stays a pure token counter; model and cost are identity/derived fields

decisions.what: LiteLLM pricing with 24h cache + static fallback
decisions.why: Always current online; graceful offline degradation; no npm dependency
CC format is undocumented/unstable; opt-in contains blast radius

decisions.what: harness usage latest instead of current (live burn rate)
decisions.why: Live tracking requires per-turn hook that CC may not support; latest shows most recent completed session
Avoids IEEE 754 floating-point drift across accumulated turns
